summary: Full UI flow tested for Akabati parcel locker app. Fixed critical login navigation bug - after login API returned 200, the app was not redirecting users to their role-based screen. Added useEffect in login.tsx to watch user state and navigate accordingly. All major flows now tested and working.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: After successful login (API 200), app stayed on /login URL. No navigation triggered. Added useEffect to watch user state in login.tsx.

integration_issues.flow: Admin Users/Parcels tab - direct URL navigation
integration_issues.issue: Navigating directly to /admin/users or /admin/parcels URL causes 401 because token is lost on hard reload. Works correctly via tab navigation from admin dashboard.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated. Non-blocking.

action_items: Main agent: The tab navigation in user layout (Send, Track, Me tabs) doesn't respond correctly when clicked by text content selectors - tested by direct URL navigation which works fine.
Main agent: Direct URL navigation to /admin/users or /admin/parcels clears auth context - token from localStorage should persist. This may be a storage.ts implementation issue.
Main agent: Alert.alert for logout confirmation may not work as expected in web preview - browser alert dialog may be blocked.
critical_code_review_comments: login.tsx was missing post-login navigation. Login function sets user state but (auth)/_layout.tsx has no auth guard - the index.tsx routing logic only runs on '/' route. Fixed by adding useEffect in login.tsx.
Recommend adding auth guard in (auth)/_layout.tsx to auto-redirect logged-in users to their role-based screen for robustness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login navigation bug fixed. All role-based flows tested: user (Amina +250788111222/test123), admin (benishimwe31@gmail.com/admin123), courier (+250788333444/courier123). All redirect correctly and show appropriate dashboards. Map screen shows OpenStreetMap with locker markers. Send parcel step-1 visible. Track parcel shows results. Admin shows stats, users list (4 users), parcels list (6 parcels). Courier dashboard shows collect/deliver tasks with Mark Complete button.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: login.tsx calls login() which sets user state in AuthContext. However, there was no code in login.tsx to navigate after user state changes. The index.tsx has routing logic but only runs on the '/' route - not on '/login'. Fix: Added useEffect in login.tsx watching the user state, navigating to role-based screen when user is set.
